name: discord
description: Minimal Discord read CLI — fetch channel history and server-wide search via REST API. Five subcommands: fetch / search / channels / status / setup.

examples.description: Pull past 2 days from a configured channel alias
Filter by an author alias (substring match)
Server-wide message search inside one guild
Pass raw IDs directly when you don't want to configure aliases
List configured channel / guild / author aliases
Check that the CDP endpoint is reachable
Launch Chrome with CDP enabled (first-time / token refresh)
